title: anthemis orientalis subsp. thracica
intro: Anthemis orientalis subsp. thracica, also known as Thraco-Danish chamomile or Thraco-Danish yarrow, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Anthemis orientalis subsp. thracica can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically for its medicinal properties.
